leadText: Tinted Lens (Japanese: いろめがね Tinted Glasses) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens doubles the damage done by any moves that the Pokémon uses which are "not very effective". This effect is independent of whether the type effectiveness is ½× or less. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tinted Lens doubles the damage done by any moves that the Pokémon uses which are "not very effective". This effect is independent of whether the type effectiveness is ½× or less.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts damage that the Pokémon inflicts with moves that are not very effective. B S L こうかが いまひとつのときに あたえるダメージが あがる MD GtI Unavailable S MD If the Pokémon uses a move that is not very effective, its power goes up! MD RT DX If the Pokémon uses a move that is not very effective, the move's power goes up.
